title: (Bullish Signal) OTRK, Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend on January 04, 2021.
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
Over the last three days, Tickeron's A.I.dvisor has detected that OTRK's AroonUp green line (see chart) is above 70, while the AroonDown red line is below 30. When the green line goes above 70 while the red line stays below 30, this is an indicator that the stock could be poised for a strong Uptrend. For traders, this could mean going long the stock or exploring call options in the next month. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested this indicator and found 97 similar cases, 89 of which were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 90%. Current price $65.45 is above $59.31 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 12/01/20 - 01/04/21, the price experienced a +27% Uptrend, while the week of 12/24/20 - 01/04/21 shows a -4% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/euai33lnhk961.png?width=1530&format=png&auto=webp&s=bafde60e4dfad759e6d581ed247542d5bb597e89

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator is in the oversold zone. Keep an eye out for a move up in the foreseeable future.

OTRK moved above its 50-day Moving Average on December 15, 2020 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for OTRK crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on December 18, 2020. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 3 of 3 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 90%.

Following a +14.22% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where OTRK advanced for three days, in 57 of 63 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 90%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 89 of 97 cases where OTRK Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 90%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/8613153-ontrak-s-otrk-64-36-aroon-indicator-entered-an-uptrend-on-january-04-2021?utm_source=raddit&utm_medium=socail&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=article&utm_term=signal)
